title: Photographs
focus: Describe people, objects, and actions in photos.
recommended: Practice object/action vocabulary and present continuous sentences.

title: Question Response
focus: Choose the best response to short questions.
recommended: Train WH-questions, yes/no questions, and distractor patterns.

title: Conversations
focus: Understand workplace conversations and speaker intent.
recommended: Review office, travel, and business collocations.

title: Short Talks
focus: Follow announcements, reports, and recorded messages.
recommended: Practice main idea, purpose, and detail questions.

title: Incomplete Sentences
focus: Grammar, word forms, prepositions, and vocabulary in single sentences.
recommended: Study grammar cards and complete short quizzes.

title: Text Completion
focus: Complete short texts with grammar, vocabulary, and sentence logic.
recommended: Read short passages and track sentence connectors.

title: Reading Comprehension
focus: Understand emails, notices, articles, and multi-text questions.
recommended: Build reading speed and save unknown vocabulary.
